creator: wosch@panke.de.freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, patch applied!

Wolfram

On 1999-03-21 12:57:45 +0000, Tom Hukins wrote:
> The patch below may be used to close this PR:
> 
> --- en/tutorials/devel/devel.docb.orig	Sat Aug 15 18:03:08 1998
> +++ en/tutorials/devel/devel.docb	Sun Mar 21 12:54:07 1999
> @@ -1346,7 +1346,7 @@
>  
>  <para>Oh, and to get out of Emacs, do <command>C-x C-c</command>
>  (that means hold down the <keysym>control</keysym> key, press
> -<keysym>c</keysym>, press <keysym>x</keysym> and release the
> +<keysym>x</keysym>, press <keysym>c</keysym> and release the
>  <keysym>control</keysym> key). If you have any unsaved files open,
>  Emacs will ask you if you want to save them. (Ignore the bit in the
>  documentation where it says <command>C-z</command> is the usual way

-- 
Wolfram Schneider <wosch@freebsd.org> http://wolfram.schneider.org
